name: Xiaomi Token Plan (Europe)

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: Xiaomi states that for EEA users data is stored in Germany (AWS) and the Netherlands (Azure). Xiaomi also states that Xiaomi Technologies Singapore Pte. Ltd. is responsible for processing some personal information for EEA/UK/CH services, and transfers outside the EEA/UK/CH may occur with safeguards.

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: Xiaomi's general privacy policy says personal information is retained only for the period necessary for the stated purposes or as required by law, and then deleted or anonymized once the purpose is fulfilled, deletion is confirmed, or the relevant service ends.
dataUsage.details: No primary-source statement specific to the MiMo API platform was found on whether API customer prompts/outputs are used for model training or whether an opt-out exists.

euAiAct.details: No primary-source EU AI Act statement specific to the MiMo API platform was found.

notes: Xiaomi provides broad group-level privacy and international transfer disclosures, but no primary-source DPA, sub-processor list, or MiMo API-specific training/retention/inference-location terms were found on the cited sources. For EEA users, Xiaomi discloses storage in Germany and the Netherlands, while also indicating some processing by Xiaomi Technologies Singapore Pte. Ltd. and use of SCCs for international transfers.
